name: Sicilian Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 oz Can Anchovies In Oil, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the anchovies in a shallow dish, cover with milk and leave to soak for 10 minutes.
2. Drain the anchovies, wash under cold water and pat dry.
3. Cut the potatoes into bite-size chunks and cook in boiling salted water for 10 to 12 minutes, until just cooked.
4. Meanwhile, chop the anchovies and mash with all the remaining ingredients except the oil.
5. Stir in the olive oil.
6. Drain the cooked potatoes and place in a large bowl.
7. Immediately add the anchovy mixture and mix the ingredients together well.
8. Transfer salad to a plastic container, cover and chill until ready to serve.
This recipe serves 6 to 8.
